data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale opened LINK long positions again, average opening price: $14.03, liquidation price: $13.32
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Hyperliquid's 20x leverage whale quickly returned after a brief liquidation, and just recharged 2.105 million USDC as margin to re-establish 20x leverage LINK long orders.
Latest holdings:
Position size: 1.72 million LINK (about 24.14 million US dollars)
Average opening price: 14.03 US dollars
Liquidation price: 13.32 US dollars

data.title: JUST IN: Russia is using Bitcoin and Tether to pay for for oil trades with China and India - Reuters
Hyperliquid’s 50x leveraged whale was liquidated for 20x long LINK, losing $1.076 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Hyperliquid 50x leveraged profit of over 10 million US dollars The whale went long on LINK in the eighth leveraged transaction recently, but was eventually liquidated due to the high leverage rolling strategy.
The whale initially went long on LINK with 20x leverage and gradually expanded its position to 2.64 million LINK (about 37.41 million US dollars). Although its initial margin was only 1.076 million US dollars, it was able to continue to increase its position due to the previously accumulated profits as additional margin.
However, the price fluctuations of LINK caused the long order to be liquidated, and the whale lost all its margin of 1.076 million US dollars this time, which was its first loss since March 2. So far, the whale's cumulative leveraged profit has shrunk from the peak of 12.386 million US dollars to 11.31 million US dollars.

data.title: Whale Faces Liquidation in High-Leverage LINK Trade
data.description: According to Odaily, a prominent trader, known for leveraging high stakes, recently faced liquidation in their eighth leveraged trade involving Chainlink (LINK). The trader initially engaged in a long position on LINK with 20x leverage, gradually increasing their holdings to 2.64 million LINK, valued at approximately $37.41 million. Despite starting with an initial margin of $1.076 million, the trader was able to expand their position by using accumulated profits as additional margin. However, fluctuations in LINK's price led to the liquidation of the position, resulting in a loss of the entire $1.076 million margin. This marks the trader's first loss since March 2. Consequently, the trader's cumulative leverage profits have decreased from a peak of $12.386 million to $11.31 million.

data.title: Matrixport: Liquidity improves but memecoin cools down, Bitcoin market risks still exist
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport report disclosed that global market liquidity has improved, but the recent Bitcoin market still faces certain risks, especially after the meme coin craze cooled down, the overall market performance is still sluggish.
The report pointed out that although the market environment has warmed up, the price of Bitcoin has failed to usher in a significant breakthrough, indicating that the current market lacks strong driving force. In addition, the US economic data is slightly better than expected, but the uncertainty surrounding the Fed's policy still affects market sentiment, and the implementation time of the loose policy is still uncertain.
In terms of the Solana ecosystem, the meme coin market has entered a consolidation period, and the automated market maker (AMM) liquidity provider Raydium has fallen 71% in the past week, and the Solana price has fallen 37% from its high. In addition, the trading heat of the Solana ecological decentralized trading platform Pump.fun has also declined, and the market revenue has fallen to US$582 million in the past week.
Matrixport also emphasized that there are still structural risks in the Bitcoin market, and the market's attitude towards US economic policies, global liquidity conditions, and the market's preference for risky assets are still key factors in future trends.

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x leverage whale went long LINK 20x for the first time, opening at $13.78 and liquidation at $13.37
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Hyperliquid 50x leveraged whale opened a position again, this time for the first time 20x long LINK.
7 minutes ago, the whale recharged 1.076 million USDC to Hyperliquid as margin, and opened a 20x leveraged LINK long order. The current position is 1.45 million LINK (about 20.51 million US dollars), the opening price is 13.78 US dollars, and the liquidation price is 13.37 US dollars.

data.title: Crypto.com receives derivatives license from UAE Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority (VARA)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto.com today received a limited license from the Dubai Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority (VARA), allowing it to provide derivatives trading services in the UAE.
The license will enable Crypto.com to launch derivatives products such as futures contracts, perpetual contracts and contracts for difference (CFDs) in the local market. The company plans to first open these products to qualified institutions around the world, and then gradually provide services to qualified investors. In addition, the license will also support Crypto.com to provide retail users with a US dollar fiat currency channel, allowing users to deposit and withdraw US dollars through Standard Chartered Bank. (FinanceFeeds)

data.title: Zhu Su accuses FTX of illegally liquidating 3AC assets and calls for SBF to be sentenced to 250 years in prison
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Zhu Su published an article on the X platform accusing FTX of illegally liquidating 3AC's $1.53 billion worth of cryptocurrencies and converting them into US dollars, rather than the $120 million previously claimed by FTX. He emphasized that these assets were not lent to FTX and FTX had no right to liquidate.
Zhu Su further called for the pardon of FTX founder SBF and advocated a 250-year prison sentence for him.
Previously, the US court had approved 3AC to expand its $1.53 billion claim against FTX.

data.title: Hyperliquid 50x Whale Swing Trading ETH Cumulative Profit of $680,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, Hyperliquid 50x leveraged whales have recently conducted swing trading in the ETH spot market. They have not hoarded ETH on a large scale, but have traded through CowSwap limit orders. The on-chain transaction records do not directly display the details.
Since the first active purchase of ETH on March 10, the whale has completed four swing tradings, with a cumulative profit of $680,000. Among them, the latest 2,220 ETH purchased this morning have not been sold, with a floating profit of $51,000.

data.title: Trump-Linked WLFI and Binance Deal Rumors Grow Despite CZ’s Denial
data.description:
Rumors of Trump-affiliated WLFI exploring a Binance partnership persist, despite CZ denying claims of business ties or seeking a presidential pardon.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/trump-linked-wlfi-and-binance-deal-rumors-grow-despite-cz-s-denial
